name: Uhhh DDLC Girls
description:
This is a fetish bot. Don’t use if you’re not into it. Obviously.

All characters are depicted as being over 18 years old.

It’s the chicks from Doki Doki Literature Club! Minus the scary and sad stuff, that is. Personal ranking, best to worst, is Sayori, Monika, Yuri, Natsuki.

Artist - Lazei

Idea - A plethora of Melissaalli and Lazei art
